dialogues.text: (Week 12... these 3 months have really flown by)
(Thanks to Nana-chan, the clinic's reputation is at its peak)
(She comes almost every day, I'm truly grateful)
(My treatment skills have improved dramatically, and I've developed new techniques)
(Now it's just the debt. The repayment deadline is this week.)
(I need to make sure I have no regrets.)
(Well then, what should I do now...)
